questions.question: Explain the main difference between a Datagram and a Packet in the context of internet communication. (6 marks)
A router uses the Distance-Vector Routing Protocol to determine the best path for a packet to travel from Router A to Router E. What are the three key components of this routing protocol? (8 marks)
Compare and contrast the Open Shortest Path First (OSPF) and the Interior Gateway Routing Protocol (IGRP) unicast routing protocols. How do their routing tables and algorithms differ? (10 marks)
